values.action.work-manual-release.title: Work the Manual Release
values.action.work-manual-release.description: Rock the exposed lever until the frozen hinge gives.
values.action.work-manual-release.success: The lubricant fractures like thin glass. The lever drops, bolts withdraw around the shell, and the lid rises on exhausted springs.
values.action.work-manual-release.failure: The lever moves once, then freezes against its housing. The lid bolts remain seated.

privateNotes: Finding the lever now provides a faster, controlled escape route while forcing the lid remains a slower alternative.
